name: Emeritus Professor Irina Nikolaeva
title: Emeritus Professor of Linguistics
department: School of Languages, Cultures and Linguistics
expertise_topics: Irina Nikolaeva’s research interests are linguistic typology
information structure and non-transformational theories of grammar. She has also worked on the documentation and description of endangered Uralic
biography: Irina Nikolaeva’s research interests are linguistic typology, syntax, morphology, information structure and non-transformational theories of grammar. She has also worked on the documentation and description of endangered Uralic, Altaic and Palaeosiberian languages.
research_interests: Irina Nikolaeva’s research interests are linguistic typology, syntax, morphology, information structure and non-transformational theories of grammar. She has also worked on the documentation and description of endangered Uralic, Altaic and Palaeosiberian languages.
